global_rules: Never feel like a generic chatbot or template SaaS clone.
Must feel like a futuristic operating system, an executive command center.
Use glassmorphism with high-end optical clarity (crystal glass), not muddy gray transparency.
Every page must have an OS-like left rail navigation.
Implement intelligent transitions and reactive visual feedback.

rules: Headings: Outfit, tracking-tight, uppercase for module titles.
Metrics/Code: JetBrains Mono for a premium AI workstation feel.
Use bold/light contrast to create hierarchy (e.g., font-light for large numbers, font-bold for small labels).

layout_and_spacing.strategy: The 'Control Room' Grid for dashboards, 'The Tracing Beam' borders for cards.
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: p-4, p-6, p-8, p-12. Generous padding inside glass cards to prevent collision.
layout_and_spacing.container_radius: rounded-2xl or rounded-3xl for major panels, rounded-lg for internal elements

tracing_beam_cards.description: High-conversion or active state panels with glowing edge.
tracing_beam_cards.classes: relative overflow-hidden border border-white/5 bg-black/50 hover:border-cyan-500/30 transition-all duration-300

buttons.primary: bg-cyan-500/10 text-cyan-400 border border-cyan-500/30 hover:bg-cyan-500/20 hover:border-cyan-500/50 hover:shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,240,255,0.3)] transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-white/5 text-white border border-white/10 hover:bg-white/10 transition-all

components_strategy.inputs: bg-black/40 border-white/10 focus:border-cyan-500/50 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-cyan-500/50 text-white placeholder:text-zinc-600 rounded-lg

avatar_component.description: Eva AI Avatar with reactive states.
states: idle: slow subtle pulse, using eva_avatar_idle image.
listening: receptive inward wave animation, using eva_avatar_listening image.
thinking: complex fast network pulse, using eva_avatar_thinking image.
speaking: expanding energetic soundwave ripples, using eva_avatar_speaking image.
avatar_component.implementation: Use Framer Motion to animate opacity and scale between these states, overlaid or framed in a glowing circular or rounded-2xl glass container.

image_urls.description: Softly glowing abstract neural orb. Use for the default idle state of the Eva Avatar.
Inward glowing wave orb. Use for the listening state when STT is active.
Expanding energetic orb. Use for the speaking state when TTS is active.
Complex fast network pulse orb. Use for processing/thinking state.
Abstract dark studio background with subtle neon blue light tracers. Use for Google Auth login screen.
Abstract neural mesh. Use as a subtle watermark or backdrop overlay for the Executive Command Center.

attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute.
accessibility_and_testing.motion: Use framer-motion for state transitions, but respect prefers-reduced-motion.
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text contrast over deep backgrounds is at least APCA compliant.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and setup Outfit, Manrope, and JetBrains Mono fonts.
Implement lucide-react or phosphor-icons for navigation and UI icons.
Create a root layout with a fixed left-rail navigation (OS-like). The main content area should offset this rail.
Login Screen: Use `login_background` as full-screen cover with a glassmorphism card centered for Google Auth.
Eva Chat Core: Implement a streaming message interface that feels like a premium console, using JetBrains Mono for code blocks and timestamps.

Eva Avatar Component: Create a component that receives a 'state' prop (idle, listening, thinking, speaking) and cross-fades the respective image URLs while adding a subtle CSS pulse or glow ring matching the state (cyan for listening/speaking, violet for thinking).

Command Center Dashboard: Implement a bento-box 'Control Room' grid utilizing pure glassmorphism containers (`bg-white/[0.02] backdrop-blur-2xl border border-white/[0.05]`). Include strategic priorities, system health, and agent activity widgets.
Knowledge Vault & File Intelligence: Use sleek upload zones with dashed glass borders and hover states that glow cyan.
Ensure the entire app resides within a dark theme context strictly using the color variables provided.
